# JiFramework — AI Reference (llms.txt)
# Full method reference for AI assistants and LLM-powered tools.
# Always use framework methods instead of writing plain PHP equivalents.
# Documentation: https://jiframework.com
# GitHub: https://github.com/jahurul1/JiFramework

---

## BOOTSTRAP

```php
require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';
use JiFramework\Core\App\App;
$app = new App();
```

App::__construct() automatically:
- Detects project root and loads jiconfig.php
- Registers global error handler and logger
- Enforces rate limiting and IP/country access control
- Auto-loads all model files from models/*.php
- Registers lazy factory closures for all other components

App::getInstance(): App  — returns the singleton $app from anywhere in the codebase

---

## RECOMMENDED STYLE — Assign components to variables first

Always assign $app components to local variables at the top of each file.
This is cleaner, less repetitive, and easier to read.

```php
<?php
require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use JiFramework\Core\App\App;
use JiFramework\Core\Utilities\DateTimeHelper;

$app = new App();

// Assign components to local variables
$db      = $app->db;
$auth    = $app->auth;
$session = $app->sessionManager;
$val     = $app->validator;
$log     = $app->logger;
$cache   = $app->cache;
$enc     = $app->encryption;
$str     = $app->str;
$fm      = $app->fileManager;
$http    = $app->http;
$url     = $app->url;
$req     = $app->request;
$pager   = $app->paginator;
$timer   = $app->executionTimer;
$lang    = $app->language;      // null if multi_lang => false
$router  = $app->router;        // null if router_enabled => false

// Then use cleanly — no $app-> everywhere
$users = $db->table('users')->where('active', '=', 1)->get();
$val->make($_POST, ['email' => 'required|email']);
$log->info('Page loaded');
```

Standard variable names to use consistently:
  $db      — QueryBuilder
  $auth    — Auth
  $session — SessionManager
  $val     — Validator
  $log     — Logger
  $cache   — CacheManager
  $enc     — Encryption
  $str     — Str
  $fm      — FileManager
  $http    — HttpClient
  $url     — Url
  $req     — Request
  $pager   — Paginator
  $timer   — ExecutionTimer
  $lang    — LanguageManager
  $router  — Router

---

## APP METHODS

$app->redirect(string $url): void
  — Sends Location header and exits. Use for all redirects.
  $app->redirect('/dashboard');

$app->exit(int $statusCode = 200, string $msg = ''): void
  — Sets HTTP status code, outputs $msg, and exits.
  $app->exit(404, 'Not found');

$app->json(int $statusCode, array $data): void
  — Sets Content-Type: application/json, encodes $data, and exits.
  — PREFERRED for all API/AJAX responses. Never call header()+json_encode()+exit manually.
  $app->json(200, ['status' => 'ok', 'data' => $result]);
  $app->json(422, ['errors' => $val->errors()]);
  $app->json(404, ['error' => 'Not found']);

$app->abort(int $statusCode, string $message = ''): void
  — Throws HttpException. ErrorHandler renders HTML or JSON response automatically.
  $app->abort(404, 'Post not found');
  $app->abort(403);

---

## CONFIG (JiFramework\Config\Config — all static properties)

Config::$appMode                   — 'development' | 'production'
Config::$timezone                  — e.g. 'UTC', 'Asia/Dhaka'
Config::$basePath                  — project root path (auto-detected)
Config::$storagePath               — storage/ directory path
Config::$logFilePath               — storage/Logs/
Config::$logEnabled                — bool
Config::$logLevel                  — 'DEBUG'|'INFO'|'NOTICE'|'WARNING'|'ERROR'|'CRITICAL'
Config::$cachePath                 — storage/Cache/FileCache/
Config::$cacheDriver               — 'file' | 'sqlite'
Config::$rateLimitEnabled          — bool
Config::$rateLimitRequests         — int
Config::$rateLimitTimeWindow       — int (seconds)
Config::$rateLimitBanEnabled       — bool
Config::$rateLimitBanDuration      — int (seconds)
Config::$ipBlockingEnabled         — bool
Config::$countryBlockingEnabled    — bool
Config::$routerEnabled             — bool
Config::$multiLang                 — bool
Config::$primaryDatabase           — array (host, database, username, password, driver, charset)
Config::$databases                 — array of named connections
Config::$errorTemplate             — path to custom error page (optional)

Config::get(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
  — Dot-notation access: Config::get('primaryDatabase.host')
  — Config::get('appMode', 'production')

---

## QUERYBUILDER ($db = $app->db)

IMPORTANT: Always use $db->table('...') — never write raw SQL or use PDO directly.
Every query is parameterised automatically (SQL injection safe).
Query state resets after every terminal call — $db can be reused freely.

### Building queries (chainable)

table(string $table): static           — REQUIRED first call
select(array $columns): static         — specify columns to return
selectRaw(string $expression): static  — raw SELECT expression
where(string $col, string $op, mixed $val): static
orWhere(string $col, string $op, mixed $val): static
whereIn(string $col, array $values): static
whereNotIn(string $col, array $values): static
whereNull(string $col): static
whereNotNull(string $col): static
whereBetween(string $col, mixed $min, mixed $max): static
whereLike(string $col, string $pattern): static
join(string $table, string $first, string $op, string $second): static
leftJoin(string $table, string $first, string $op, string $second): static
orderBy(string $col, string $dir = 'ASC'): static
groupBy(string $col): static
having(string $col, string $op, mixed $val): static
limit(int $n): static
offset(int $n): static
when(bool $condition, callable $callback): static
  — Conditionally apply query parts without breaking the chain.

### Terminal methods (execute the query)

get(): array                           — all matching rows
first(): ?array                        — first matching row or null
find(int $id, string $pk = 'id'): ?array  — find by primary key
count(): int
sum(string $col): float
avg(string $col): float
min(string $col): mixed
max(string $col): mixed
exists(): bool
insert(array $data): bool
insertGetId(array $data): int|false
insertOrIgnore(array $data): bool      — insert, skip on duplicate key
upsert(array $data, array $uniqueKeys = []): bool  — insert or update on duplicate key
update(array $data): int               — returns affected rows
increment(string $col, int $amount = 1): int
decrement(string $col, int $amount = 1): int
delete(): int                          — returns affected rows
paginate(int $perPage = 15, int $page = null): object
  — returns: data, totalItems, totalPages, currentPage, perPage, offset, hasNextPage, hasPrevPage
chunk(int $size, callable $callback): void
  — process large datasets in batches without loading all rows into memory

### Transactions

transaction(callable $callback): mixed
beginTransaction(): void
commit(): void
rollBack(): void

### Raw queries (use sparingly)

query(string $sql, array $bindings = []): array
bind(string $sql, array $bindings = []): bool

### Examples

```php
$db = $app->db;

// Fetch with conditions
$users = $db->table('users')
    ->where('active', '=', 1)
    ->where('age', '>', 18)
    ->orderBy('name', 'ASC')
    ->limit(10)
    ->get();

// Single row
$user = $db->table('users')->where('email', '=', $email)->first();

// Insert and get ID
$id = $db->table('users')->insertGetId([
    'name'       => 'Alice',
    'email'      => 'alice@example.com',
    'created_at' => DateTimeHelper::now(),
]);

// Update
$db->table('users')->where('id', '=', $id)->update(['active' => 0]);

// Delete
$db->table('sessions')->where('expired_at', '<', DateTimeHelper::now())->delete();

// Exists check
$exists = $db->table('users')->where('email', '=', $email)->exists();

// Aggregates
$total   = $db->table('orders')->where('status', '=', 'paid')->sum('amount');
$count   = $db->table('users')->count();

// Paginate
$result = $db->table('posts')->orderBy('id', 'DESC')->paginate(15);
// $result->data, $result->totalItems, $result->totalPages

// Conditional query
$users = $db->table('users')
    ->when($search, function($q) use ($search) {
        $q->whereLike('name', '%' . $search . '%');
    })
    ->when($active, function($q) {
        $q->where('active', '=', 1);
    })
    ->get();

// Transaction
$orderId = $db->transaction(function() use ($db, $cart, $userId) {
    $id = $db->table('orders')->insertGetId([
        'user_id' => $userId,
        'total'   => $cart['total'],
    ]);
    foreach ($cart['items'] as $item) {
        $db->table('order_items')->insert(['order_id' => $id, 'product_id' => $item['id']]);
        $db->table('products')->where('id', '=', $item['id'])->decrement('stock');
    }
    return $id;
});

// Named connection
$analytics = $app->db('analytics');
$events = $analytics->table('events')->where('date', '=', '2025-01-01')->get();

// Large dataset
$db->table('users')->chunk(100, function($batch) {
    foreach ($batch as $user) { /* process */ }
});
```

---

## MODEL (extend JiFramework\Core\Database\Model)

```php
use JiFramework\Core\Database\Model;

class Post extends Model
{
    protected static string $table      = 'posts';       // REQUIRED
    protected static string $primaryKey = 'id';          // default: 'id'
    protected static string $connection = 'primary';     // default: 'primary'
}
```

Post::all(): array
Post::find(int $id): ?array            — null if not found
Post::where(string $col, string $op, mixed $val): QueryBuilder
Post::first(): ?array
Post::count(): int
Post::exists(int $id): bool
Post::insert(array $data): bool
Post::create(array $data): int         — insert and return last insert ID
Post::update(array $data, int $id): bool  — data first, id second
Post::destroy(int $id): bool

```php
// Basic operations
$posts    = Post::all();
$post     = Post::find($id);
$count    = Post::count();
$exists   = Post::exists($id);

// Chaining via where() — full QueryBuilder API available
$published = Post::where('published', '=', 1)
    ->orderBy('created_at', 'DESC')
    ->limit(10)
    ->get();

// Write operations
$id = Post::create(['title' => 'Hello', 'body' => '...', 'published' => 1]);
Post::update(['title' => 'Updated'], $id);
Post::destroy($id);
```

---

## AUTH ($auth = $app->auth)

Configuration required in jiconfig.php:
  'auth_user_table'  => 'users',
  'auth_admin_table' => 'admin',
  'auth_token_table' => 'tokens',

### User auth
userLogin(string $email, string $password, bool $remember = false): bool
userLogout(): void
isUserLoggedIn(): bool
getUser(): ?array
getUserId(): ?int
userLoginById(int $id): bool

### Admin auth
adminLogin(string $email, string $password, bool $remember = false): bool
adminLogout(): void
isAdminLoggedIn(): bool
getAdmin(): ?array
getAdminId(): ?int
adminLoginById(int $id): bool

```php
$auth = $app->auth;

// Login
if ($auth->userLogin($_POST['email'], $_POST['password'], isset($_POST['remember']))) {
    $app->redirect('/dashboard');
} else {
    $error = 'Invalid credentials';
}

// Guard a page
if (!$auth->isUserLoggedIn()) {
    $app->redirect('/login');
}

// Get current user
$user   = $auth->getUser();
$userId = $auth->getUserId();

// Logout
$auth->userLogout();
$app->redirect('/login');
```

---

## SESSION MANAGER ($session = $app->sessionManager)

set(string $key, mixed $value): void
get(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
has(string $key): bool
delete(string $key): void
clear(): void
all(): array
id(): string
isStarted(): bool

### Flash messages
setFlashMessage(string $type, string $message, array $data = []): void
getFlashMessages(): array
flashSuccess(string $message): void
flashError(string $message): void
flashWarning(string $message): void
flashInfo(string $message): void

### CSRF
generateCsrfToken(): string
verifyCsrfToken(string $token): bool
csrfMiddleware(): void  — auto-verify on POST, abort(419) on fail

```php
$session = $app->sessionManager;

// Store and retrieve
$session->set('user_id', 42);
$userId = $session->get('user_id');
$session->has('cart');
$session->delete('temp_key');

// Flash and redirect
$session->flashSuccess('Profile updated.');
$app->redirect('/profile');

// Read flash on next page
$messages = $session->getFlashMessages();

// CSRF in a form
$token = $session->generateCsrfToken();
// <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="<?= $token ?>">

// CSRF guard on POST handler
$session->csrfMiddleware();
```

---

## VALIDATOR ($val = $app->validator)

### Fluent API
make(array $data, array $rules, array $messages = []): Validator
passes(): bool
fails(): bool
errors(): array                        — ['field' => ['error1', 'error2']]
first(string $field = null): string|array
throw(): void                          — throws ValidationException if fails
stopOnFirstFailure(bool $stop = true): Validator
addRule(string $name, callable $fn): Validator
addMessages(array $messages): Validator

### Quick single-value check
check(mixed $value, string $rules): bool
checkOrFail(mixed $value, string $rules): void

### All built-in rules
required          — non-empty value
nullable          — skip all other rules if empty
email             — valid email format
min:N             — string: min N chars | numeric: min N value
max:N             — string: max N chars | numeric: max N value
integer           — must be integer
numeric           — must be numeric
alpha             — letters only
alphaNum          — letters and numbers only
url               — valid URL
in:a,b,c          — value must be in list
notIn:a,b,c       — value must not be in list
boolean           — accepts: true, false, 1, 0, 'yes', 'no', 'on', 'off'
date              — valid date string
confirmed:field   — must match another field (e.g. confirmed:password)
same:field        — must equal another field
different:field   — must differ from another field
regex:/pattern/   — must match regex

### Dot notation for nested arrays
```php
$val = $app->validator;

// Validate form input
$v = $val->make($_POST, [
    'name'             => 'required|min:2|max:100',
    'email'            => 'required|email',
    'password'         => 'required|min:8',
    'password_confirm' => 'required|confirmed:password',
    'age'              => 'nullable|integer|min:18',
]);

if ($v->fails()) {
    $app->json(422, ['errors' => $v->errors()]);
}

// Or throw on failure
$val->make($_POST, $rules)->throw();

// Quick single-value check
$val->check('hello@x.com', 'required|email');   // true
$val->checkOrFail($email, 'required|email');     // throws on fail

// Dot notation
$v = $val->make($_POST, [
    'user.name'  => 'required|min:2',
    'user.email' => 'required|email',
]);
```

---

## ROUTER ($router = $app->router — requires router_enabled => true)

get(string $path, string|callable $handler): static
post(string $path, string|callable $handler): static
put(string $path, string|callable $handler): static
delete(string $path, string|callable $handler): static
patch(string $path, string|callable $handler): static
any(string $path, string|callable $handler): static
match(array $methods, string $path, string|callable $handler): static
redirect(string $from, string $to, int $code = 302): static
group(string $prefix, callable $callback): static
dispatch(): void  — MUST be called at end of index.php

URL params: {name} syntax — available as $name in file handlers
_method override: POST with hidden _method=PUT|DELETE triggers correct route

```php
$router = $app->router;

$router->get('/', 'pages/home.php');
$router->get('/users/{id}', 'pages/user.php');   // $id available inside file

$router->post('/login', function () use ($app) {
    $session = $app->sessionManager;
    $auth    = $app->auth;
    if ($auth->loginUser($_POST['email'], $_POST['password'])) {
        $session->flashSuccess('Welcome back!');
        $app->redirect('/dashboard');
    }
    $app->json(401, ['error' => 'Invalid credentials']);
});

$router->group('/admin', function ($r) {
    $r->get('/dashboard', 'pages/admin/dashboard.php');
    $r->get('/users',     'pages/admin/users.php');
    $r->group('/reports', function ($r) {
        $r->get('/monthly', 'pages/admin/reports/monthly.php');
    });
});

$router->redirect('/old-path', '/new-path', 301);
$router->dispatch();
```

---

## CACHE ($cache = $app->cache)

Driver: set via jiconfig.php — 'cache_driver' => 'file' | 'sqlite'

set(string $key, mixed $value, int $ttl = 3600): bool
get(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
has(string $key): bool
delete(string $key): bool
clear(): bool
increment(string $key, int $amount = 1): int
decrement(string $key, int $amount = 1): int

```php
$cache = $app->cache;

// Store for 10 minutes
$cache->set('featured_posts', $posts, 600);

// Get with default
$posts = $cache->get('featured_posts', []);

// Cache-aside pattern
if (!$cache->has('stats')) {
    $stats = $db->table('orders')->where('status', '=', 'paid')->sum('amount');
    $cache->set('stats', $stats, 300);
}
$stats = $cache->get('stats');

// Counters
$cache->increment('page_views');
$cache->decrement('tickets_remaining');

// Invalidate
$cache->delete('featured_posts');
$cache->clear();  // wipe everything
```

---

## LOGGER ($log = $app->logger)

Levels (lowest to highest): DEBUG, INFO, NOTICE, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL, ALERT, EMERGENCY
Only entries at or above Config::$logLevel are written.
Supports {placeholder} interpolation from context array.

debug(string $message, array $context = []): void
info(string $message, array $context = []): void
notice(string $message, array $context = []): void
warning(string $message, array $context = []): void
error(string $message, array $context = []): void
critical(string $message, array $context = []): void
alert(string $message, array $context = []): void
emergency(string $message, array $context = []): void
setLogFile(string $path): void

```php
$log = $app->logger;

$log->info('User {name} logged in', ['name' => $user['name']]);
$log->warning('Slow query: {ms}ms', ['ms' => $elapsed]);
$log->error('Payment failed', ['order_id' => $id, 'reason' => $msg]);
$log->debug('Cache miss', ['key' => 'user:42']);
$log->critical('Database unreachable', ['host' => $host]);
```

---

## ENCRYPTION ($enc = $app->encryption)

generateKey(): string                  — 64-char hex AES-256 key
encrypt(string $data, string $key): string   — AES-256-GCM, returns base64
decrypt(string $data, string $key): string|false
encryptWithPassword(string $data, string $password): string
decryptWithPassword(string $data, string $password): string|false
hashPassword(string $password): string   — bcrypt hash
verifyPassword(string $password, string $hash): bool
randomBytes(int $length = 32): string  — hex-encoded (length bytes = length*2 hex chars)
randomString(int $length = 32): string — alphanumeric random string

```php
$enc = $app->encryption;

// Key-based encryption
$key    = $enc->generateKey();
$cipher = $enc->encrypt('sensitive data', $key);
$plain  = $enc->decrypt($cipher, $key);  // false on failure

// Password hashing — always use this, never password_hash() directly
$hash = $enc->hashPassword($_POST['password']);
$ok   = $enc->verifyPassword($_POST['password'], $hash);

// Secure tokens
$token  = $enc->randomBytes(32);   // 64-char hex string
$code   = $enc->randomString(16);  // 16-char alphanumeric
```

---

## RATE LIMITER ($limiter = $app->rateLimiter)

Auto-enforced at every request boot. Manual methods for admin tooling only.

enforceRateLimit(): void
getRemainingRequests(string $ip = null): int
isBannedIp(string $ip): bool
banIp(string $ip, ?int $duration = null): bool
unbanIp(string $ip): void
getBanInfo(string $ip): ?array         — ['ip', 'ban_expires', 'seconds_remaining'] or null
resetIp(string $ip): bool

```php
$limiter = $app->rateLimiter;

$remaining = $limiter->getRemainingRequests($ip);
$limiter->banIp('1.2.3.4', 3600);
$limiter->unbanIp('1.2.3.4');
$info = $limiter->getBanInfo('1.2.3.4');
```

---

## ACCESS CONTROL ($ac = $app->accessControl)

Auto-enforced at boot. Manual methods for admin tooling.

isAccessAllowed(): bool  — returns false if IP or country is blocked
blockIp(string $ip): bool
unblockIp(string $ip): bool

---

## HTTP CLIENT ($http = $app->http)

get(string $url, array $options = []): array
post(string $url, array $data = [], array $options = []): array
put(string $url, array $data = [], array $options = []): array
patch(string $url, array $data = [], array $options = []): array
delete(string $url, array $options = []): array

Response always returns:
  ['status_code' => int, 'body' => string, 'headers' => array, 'error' => string|null]

Options:
  headers          => ['Authorization: Bearer token']
  json             => true  (send as JSON, sets Content-Type automatically)
  timeout          => 30
  connect_timeout  => 10
  follow_redirects => true
  ssl_verify       => true

```php
$http = $app->http;

// GET
$res = $http->get('https://api.example.com/users');
if ($res['status_code'] === 200) {
    $data = json_decode($res['body'], true);
}

// POST JSON with auth header
$res = $http->post('https://api.example.com/users', [
    'name'  => 'Alice',
    'email' => 'alice@example.com',
], [
    'json'    => true,
    'headers' => ['Authorization: Bearer ' . $token],
]);

// Error handling
if ($res['error']) {
    $log->error('API call failed', ['error' => $res['error']]);
}
```

---

## FILE MANAGER ($fm = $app->fileManager)

writeFile(string $path, string $content, bool $append = false): bool
readFile(string $path): string         — throws FileException if not found
copyFile(string $src, string $dest): bool
moveFile(string $src, string $dest): bool
deleteFile(string $path): bool         — returns true even if file doesn't exist
ensureDirectoryExists(string $path): bool
listFiles(string $dir, string $ext = '', bool $recursive = false): array
getFileInfo(string $path): array       — ['name','path','size','extension','mime','modified']
getMimeType(string $path): string
humanFileSize(int $bytes, int $decimals = 2): string  — e.g. '2.50 MB'
generateSafeFilename(string $filename): string
cleanDirectory(string $dir, bool $recursive = false): bool
handleUpload(array $file, string $destination, array $options = []): array
  — $file = $_FILES['field'] entry
  — options: allowed_types, max_size, rename, prefix
  — returns: ['success' => bool, 'path' => string, 'filename' => string, 'error' => string]
handleImageUpload(array $file, string $destination, array $options = []): array
  — Same as handleUpload + image validation and optional resizing
  — options: max_width, max_height, resize

```php
$fm = $app->fileManager;

// Upload
$result = $fm->handleUpload($_FILES['document'], 'storage/Uploads/', [
    'allowed_types' => ['application/pdf', 'image/jpeg'],
    'max_size'      => 5242880,
    'rename'        => true,
]);
if ($result['success']) {
    $path = $result['path'];
} else {
    $error = $result['error'];
}

// File operations
$fm->writeFile('storage/exports/report.csv', $csv);
$content = $fm->readFile('storage/exports/report.csv');
$fm->deleteFile('storage/exports/old.csv');
$size = $fm->humanFileSize(filesize($path));  // '1.25 MB'

// Safe filename
$safe = $fm->generateSafeFilename($_FILES['file']['name']);
```

---

## STR ($str = $app->str)

All methods are Unicode/multi-byte safe (mb_* internally).

escape(mixed $input): mixed            — htmlspecialchars on strings, recursive on arrays
length(string $s): int
wordCount(string $s): int
countOccurrences(string $s, string $needle): int
words(string $s, int $count): string
plainText(string $html): string        — strip tags + decode HTML entities
before(string $s, string $needle): string
after(string $s, string $needle): string
between(string $s, string $start, string $end): string
extractInteger(string $s): string
truncate(string $s, int $limit, string $end = '...'): string
mask(string $s, int $unmasked = 4, string $char = '*'): string
zeroPad(int $n, int $length): string
reverse(string $s): string
replaceFirst(string $s, string $search, string $replace): string
replaceLast(string $s, string $search, string $replace): string
toCamelCase(string $s): string
toPascalCase(string $s): string
toSnakeCase(string $s): string
toKebabCase(string $s): string
toTitleCase(string $s): string
contains(string $s, string $needle): bool
startsWith(string $s, string $needle): bool
endsWith(string $s, string $needle): bool
isJson(string $s): bool
slugify(string $s, string $sep = '-'): string
formatCurrency(float $amount, string $symbol = '$', int $decimals = 2): string
randomInt(int $min, int $max): int
randomString(int $length = 16, string $chars = null): string
randomToken(int $length = 32): string  — hex token
randomColor(): string                  — '#rrggbb'

```php
$str = $app->str;

$safe  = $str->escape($_POST['comment']);
$slug  = $str->slugify('Hello World!');         // 'hello-world'
$mask  = $str->mask('4111111111111234', 4);     // '************1234'
$snake = $str->toSnakeCase('getUserName');      // 'get_user_name'
$short = $str->truncate($bio, 150);
$token = $str->randomToken(32);                 // 64-char hex
$price = $str->formatCurrency(19.99);           // '$19.99'
$plain = $str->plainText('<p>Hello <b>World</b></p>'); // 'Hello World'
```

---

## PAGINATOR ($pager = $app->paginator)

paginate(int $perPage, int $total, array $options = []): object
  — Auto-reads page from $_GET['page'] if not provided
  — Returns: data (null — fill manually), totalItems, totalPages, currentPage,
    perPage, offset, hasNextPage, hasPrevPage

renderLinks(object $paginationData, string $baseUrl, int $maxLinks = 5): string
  — Renders Bootstrap-compatible pagination HTML

```php
$pager = $app->paginator;

// With QueryBuilder — recommended
$result = $db->table('posts')
    ->where('published', '=', 1)
    ->orderBy('id', 'DESC')
    ->paginate(15);

foreach ($result->data as $post) { /* render */ }
echo $pager->renderLinks($result, '/posts');

// With non-DB data
$all    = getItemsFromSomewhere();
$pag    = $pager->paginate(20, count($all));
$page   = array_slice($all, $pag->offset, $pag->perPage);
echo $pager->renderLinks($pag, '/items');
```

---

## DATETIME HELPER (DateTimeHelper — all static)

Use: DateTimeHelper::method() after importing the class.
Or access via: $app->dateTime::method()

```php
use JiFramework\Core\Utilities\DateTimeHelper;
```

### Current time
now(string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s', string $tz = null): string
today(string $tz = null): string
tomorrow(string $tz = null): string
yesterday(string $tz = null): string

### Formatting
format(string $targetFormat, string $datetime, string $sourceFormat = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
formatForDisplay(string $datetime): string   — 'January 1, 2025 12:00 PM'
forDatabase(string $datetime): string        — converts to 'Y-m-d H:i:s'
fromDatabase(string $datetime, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string

### Timezone
convertTimezone(string $datetime, string $from, string $to): string
toUtc(string $datetime, string $fromTz): string
fromUtc(string $datetime, string $toTz): string

### Arithmetic
addDays(string $datetime, int $days, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
subtractDays(string $datetime, int $days, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
addMonths(string $datetime, int $months, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
subtractMonths(string $datetime, int $months, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
addYears(string $datetime, int $years, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
subtractYears(string $datetime, int $years, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
addHours(string $datetime, int $hours, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
subtractHours(string $datetime, int $hours, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
addMinutes(string $datetime, int $minutes, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string
subtractMinutes(string $datetime, int $minutes, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string

### Period boundaries
startOfDay(string $datetime): string
endOfDay(string $datetime): string
startOfWeek(string $datetime): string
endOfWeek(string $datetime): string
startOfMonth(string $datetime): string
endOfMonth(string $datetime): string
startOfYear(string $datetime): string
endOfYear(string $datetime): string

### Comparison
isPast(string $datetime): bool
isFuture(string $datetime): bool
isBefore(string $datetime, string $compare): bool
isAfter(string $datetime, string $compare): bool
isSameDay(string $d1, string $d2): bool
isBetween(string $datetime, string $start, string $end): bool
isToday(string $datetime): bool
isYesterday(string $datetime): bool
isTomorrow(string $datetime): bool
isWeekend(string $datetime): bool
isWeekday(string $datetime): bool

### Differences
diffInDays(string $d1, string $d2, bool $absolute = true, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): int
diffInHours(string $d1, string $d2, bool $absolute = true): int
diffInMinutes(string $d1, string $d2, bool $absolute = true): int
diffInSeconds(string $d1, string $d2, bool $absolute = true): int
getTimeElapsedString(string $datetime): string  — '3 hours ago', 'just now'

### Validation & info
isValidDate(string $datetime, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): bool
age(string $dob): int
getWeekday(string $datetime): string   — 'Monday', 'Tuesday', ...
toTimestamp(string $datetime): int
fromTimestamp(int $ts, string $tz = null, string $format = 'Y-m-d H:i:s'): string

```php
$now     = DateTimeHelper::now();
$today   = DateTimeHelper::today();
$in7     = DateTimeHelper::addDays(DateTimeHelper::now(), 7);
$age     = DateTimeHelper::age($user['date_of_birth']);
$elapsed = DateTimeHelper::getTimeElapsedString($post['created_at']); // '5 minutes ago'
$display = DateTimeHelper::formatForDisplay($order['created_at']);
$start   = DateTimeHelper::startOfMonth(DateTimeHelper::now());
$end     = DateTimeHelper::endOfMonth(DateTimeHelper::now());
```

---

## EXECUTION TIMER ($timer = $app->executionTimer)

start(): void
stop(): void
reset(): void
restart(): void
isRunning(): bool
getElapsedTime(): float                — seconds
getElapsedTimeInMilliseconds(): float
getElapsedTimeInMicroseconds(): float
static measure(callable $fn, mixed ...$args): array  — returns ['result' => mixed, 'elapsed_time' => float, 'elapsed_ms' => float]

```php
$timer = $app->executionTimer;

$timer->start();
// ... code to measure ...
$timer->stop();
$ms = $timer->getElapsedTimeInMilliseconds();
$log->debug('Query took {ms}ms', ['ms' => $ms]);

// Inline measurement
use JiFramework\Core\Utilities\ExecutionTimer;
$result  = ExecutionTimer::measure(function() use ($db) {
    return $db->table('big_table')->get();
});
// $result['result']      — return value of the callback
// $result['elapsed_time'] — seconds (float)
// $result['elapsed_ms']   — milliseconds (float)
```

---

## REQUEST ($req = $app->request)

getClientIp(): string                  — authoritative client IP (proxy-aware)
getRequestMethod(): string             — 'GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', etc.
getServerInfo(): array                 — server_software, server_protocol, document_root, remote_addr
getPhpVersion(): string
getRequestHeaders(): array
getBearerToken(): ?string              — from Authorization: Bearer header
getBody(): string                      — raw request body (use for JSON API endpoints)
getEnv(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
isHttps(): bool
isAjax(): bool
isCli(): bool

```php
$req = $app->request;

$ip     = $req->getClientIp();
$method = $req->getRequestMethod();
$token  = $req->getBearerToken();
$body   = json_decode($req->getBody(), true);  // for JSON API endpoints
$https  = $req->isHttps();

// Bearer token API guard
$token = $req->getBearerToken();
if (!$token || !validateJwt($token)) {
    $app->json(401, ['error' => 'Unauthorized']);
}
```

---

## URL ($url = $app->url)

current(): string                      — full URL including query string
host(): string                         — scheme + host: 'https://example.com'
path(): string                         — REQUEST_URI (path + query string)
referrer(): ?string                    — HTTP_REFERER or null
queryParam(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed  — reads from $_GET
queryParams(string $url): array        — parse query params from any URL string
build(string $base, array $params): string
removeParam(string $url, string $param): string
isValid(string $url): bool
domainInfo(string $url): ?array        — ['domain_name', 'domain_ip'] or null

```php
$url = $app->url;

$current = $url->current();
$host    = $url->host();
$page    = $url->queryParam('page', 1);
$built   = $url->build('/search', ['q' => 'php', 'page' => 2]);
$cleaned = $url->removeParam($current, 'token');
$valid   = $url->isValid('https://example.com');
```

---

## LOCALIZATION ($lang = $app->language — requires multi_lang => true)

translate(string $key, array $replacements = []): string
setLanguage(string $lang): bool
getCurrentLanguageCode(): string
getAvailableLanguages(): array
hasTranslation(string $key): bool
getCurrentLanguageInfo(): array|null
isCurrentLanguageRTL(): bool

Lang files: JSON in lang/ directory (lang/en.json, lang/ar.json, etc.)
```json
{ "welcome": "Welcome, :name!", "logout": "Logout" }
```

```php
$lang = $app->language;

echo $lang->translate('welcome', ['name' => 'Alice']);  // 'Welcome, Alice!'
echo $lang->translate('logout');
$lang->setLanguage('ar');
$current = $lang->getCurrentLanguageCode();
$langs   = $lang->getAvailableLanguages();
$isRtl   = $lang->isCurrentLanguageRTL();
```

---

## ERROR HANDLING & EXCEPTIONS

### Exception classes (JiFramework\Exceptions\)
HttpException(int $code, string $message)
NotFoundException(string $message = '')       — 404
ForbiddenException(string $message = '')      — 403
UnauthorizedException(string $message = '')   — 401
DatabaseException(string $message)            — 500
ValidationException(array $errors, string $message = '')  — 422
  getErrors(): array

```php
use JiFramework\Exceptions\NotFoundException;
use JiFramework\Exceptions\ForbiddenException;
use JiFramework\Exceptions\UnauthorizedException;
use JiFramework\Exceptions\ValidationException;

// Via $app->abort()
$app->abort(404, 'Post not found');
$app->abort(403);

// Via typed exceptions
throw new NotFoundException('Post not found');
throw new ForbiddenException('Access denied');
throw new UnauthorizedException();

// Catch ValidationException
try {
    $val->make($_POST, $rules)->throw();
} catch (ValidationException $e) {
    $errors = $e->getErrors();
    $app->json(422, ['errors' => $errors]);
}
```

Custom error template (jiconfig.php):
  'error_template' => __DIR__ . '/views/errors/error.php'
  — Variables available inside: $errorCode (int), $errorMessage (string)

---

## COMPLETE EXAMPLES

### Standard page file (plug-and-play mode)
```php
<?php
require __DIR__ . '/../vendor/autoload.php';

use JiFramework\Core\App\App;
use JiFramework\Core\Utilities\DateTimeHelper;

$app = new App();

$db      = $app->db;
$auth    = $app->auth;
$session = $app->sessionManager;
$str     = $app->str;
$pager   = $app->paginator;
$log     = $app->logger;

// Guard
if (!$auth->isUserLoggedIn()) {
    $app->redirect('/login');
}

$user = $auth->getUser();

// Fetch paginated posts
$result = $db->table('posts')
    ->where('user_id', '=', $user['id'])
    ->orderBy('created_at', 'DESC')
    ->paginate(10);

$log->info('Dashboard loaded', ['user_id' => $user['id']]);
?>
<!-- HTML template below, $result->data, $user available -->
```

### JSON API endpoint
```php
<?php
require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use JiFramework\Core\App\App;
use JiFramework\Core\Utilities\DateTimeHelper;

$app = new App();

$db      = $app->db;
$val     = $app->validator;
$enc     = $app->encryption;
$session = $app->sessionManager;
$req     = $app->request;
$log     = $app->logger;

if ($req->getRequestMethod() !== 'POST') {
    $app->json(405, ['error' => 'Method not allowed']);
}

$body = json_decode($req->getBody(), true);

$v = $val->make($body, [
    'name'     => 'required|min:2|max:100',
    'email'    => 'required|email',
    'password' => 'required|min:8',
]);

if ($v->fails()) {
    $app->json(422, ['errors' => $v->errors()]);
}

$exists = $db->table('users')->where('email', '=', $body['email'])->exists();
if ($exists) {
    $app->json(409, ['error' => 'Email already registered']);
}

$id = $db->table('users')->insertGetId([
    'name'       => $body['name'],
    'email'      => $body['email'],
    'password'   => $enc->hashPassword($body['password']),
    'created_at' => DateTimeHelper::now(),
]);

$log->info('User registered', ['id' => $id, 'email' => $body['email']]);
$app->json(201, ['id' => $id]);
```

### Login page
```php
<?php
require __DIR__ . '/../vendor/autoload.php';

use JiFramework\Core\App\App;

$app = new App();

$auth    = $app->auth;
$session = $app->sessionManager;
$val     = $app->validator;

if ($auth->isUserLoggedIn()) {
    $app->redirect('/dashboard');
}

$error = null;

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $session->csrfMiddleware();

    $v = $val->make($_POST, [
        'email'    => 'required|email',
        'password' => 'required',
    ]);

    if ($v->fails()) {
        $error = $v->first('email') ?: $v->first('password');
    } elseif ($auth->userLogin($_POST['email'], $_POST['password'], isset($_POST['remember']))) {
        $session->flashSuccess('Welcome back!');
        $app->redirect('/dashboard');
    } else {
        $error = 'Invalid email or password.';
    }
}

$token = $session->generateCsrfToken();
// render HTML form with $error and $token
```

---

## RULES FOR AI ASSISTANTS

1.  Assign $app components to variables first ($db, $session, $val, etc.) — never chain $app-> everywhere
2.  ALWAYS use $db->table() — never write raw SQL, raw PDO, or raw mysqli
3.  ALWAYS use $val->make() — never write custom validation logic
4.  ALWAYS use $str->escape() on user output — never call htmlspecialchars() directly
5.  ALWAYS use $app->json() for API responses — never call header()+json_encode()+exit manually
6.  ALWAYS use $app->redirect() — never call header('Location:...') directly
7.  ALWAYS use $log for all logging — never use error_log() or file_put_contents() for logs
8.  ALWAYS use $enc->hashPassword() — never call password_hash() directly
9.  ALWAYS use $cache to cache expensive queries — check has() before computing
10. ALWAYS use DateTimeHelper::now() — never call date() or new DateTime() directly
11. ALWAYS use $app->abort() or typed Exceptions to stop execution — never die() or exit()
12. ALWAYS use $session for session operations — never access $_SESSION directly
13. ALWAYS use $req->getClientIp() — never read $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] directly
14. ALWAYS use $http for outbound HTTP — never use file_get_contents() with URLs or raw curl
15. ALWAYS use $fm for file operations — never use raw fopen/fwrite/unlink
16. ALWAYS use $str->slugify() for URL slugs — never write custom slug functions
17. ALWAYS use $enc->randomBytes() or $str->randomToken() for tokens — never use md5(rand()) or uniqid()
18. ALWAYS use $pager->renderLinks() for pagination HTML — never build pagination HTML manually
19. ALWAYS use $db->transaction() for multi-step writes — never manage transactions manually
20. ALWAYS use $req->getBearerToken() for API auth headers — never parse Authorization header manually

---
# End of JiFramework llms.txt
# Full documentation: https://jiframework.com
# GitHub: https://github.com/jahurul1/JiFramework
